description: v0.4 M1b — win-x64 baseline placeholder. The perf-gate workflow runs in soft-fail mode for this triple until the first green windows-2022 run lands on main; then repin via `python3 scripts/pfsf_perf_gate.py --update-baseline --results ... --baseline benchmarks/baselines/v0.4-win-x64.json`. Expect similar Java-ref numbers (identical JDK 17 Temurin), native numbers may shift ±15% from linux depending on MSVC codegen vs GCC/Clang.

runner.note: GitHub Actions windows-2022 runner fleet. MSVC 19.x, -arch:AVX2 (closest x86-64-v3 equivalent). First-pin after M1 lands.

primitives.name: normalize_soa6_64k
primitives.note: Conservative first-pin Java max (50 ns). Windows JIT warmup under the Actions runner's Hyper-V can run 30-40% slower than linux-x64 — repin after 3 green runs.

primitives.name: chebyshev_table_64
primitives.note: Table-size JIT warmup noise; conservative initial budget.

primitives.name: apply_wind_bias_64k
primitives.note: Native floor off until first-pin confirms MSVC /arch:AVX2 codegen hits the same 1.5× target as linux.
